reason: Verified that the SuperAgent can successfully use browser tools to open a URL, retrieve page content, and report the page title
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the SuperAgent interface with agent list visible in sidebar
Found and clicked the "QA-20260511-215651-vb16" agent in the sidebar — Successfully opened the agent chat interface
Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message successfully sent and agent status changed to "working"
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response — Agent completed the task in 12 seconds and returned a response with browser tool activity logs
Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states: "The page title is "Example Domain"." The agent successfully executed multiple browser tools:
